title: bidens serboana
intro: Bidens serboana, also known as Serbo's beggar ticks, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae), native to the mountainous regions of Central and Eastern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Bidens serboana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of various infections, including respiratory and urinary tract infections. Bidens serboana can be prepared as a decoction or an infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used as a tincture or a salve for topical application.
